message:
refactor(ops): replace hardcoded engine binary paths with multi-candidate resolver

Eliminate hardcoded /dp/franken_engine/target/release/franken-engine paths
with a proper multi-candidate resolution strategy:

engine_dispatcher.rs:
- Add default_engine_binary_candidates() building priority-ordered list:
  sibling workspace, workspace-local, then legacy absolute paths
- Add resolve_engine_binary_path_with() pure resolver with DI for testing:
  (1) FRANKEN_ENGINE_BIN env var, (2) configured hint if exists, (3) first
  existing candidate, (4) bare command name, (5) "franken-engine" fallback
- 5 unit tests covering env override, hint, candidate discovery, command-
  style hint, and missing-absolute-hint fallback

lockstep_harness.rs:
- Add is_franken_runtime() recognizing all three aliases (franken-node,
  franken_engine, franken-engine) — previously missed franken-engine
- Add resolve_runtime_binary() delegating to engine_dispatcher for any
  franken alias, replacing inline match with hardcoded paths
- 3 new tests + 2 updated tests for alias recognition and resolution

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
